Title: Transfer Funds with Valid Data
Preconditions: User is on Transfer Funds page with two accounts and sufficient balance
Test Steps:
1. Select valid From Account
2. Select valid To Account (different from From Account)
3. Enter valid transfer amount (greater than zero, less than or equal to balance)
4. Click 'Transfer'
Expected Result: Funds are transferred and confirmation message is displayed

Title: Transfer Fails if Amount Field is Empty
Preconditions: User is on Transfer Funds page
Test Steps:
1. Select From Account and To Account
2. Leave amount field empty
3. Click 'Transfer'

Title: Transfer Fails if Amount is Zero
Preconditions: User is on Transfer Funds page
Test Steps:
1. Select From Account and To Account
2. Enter 0 as amount
3. Click 'Transfer'
Expected Result: Error message: Amount must be greater than zero

Title: Transfer Fails if Amount is Negative
Preconditions: User is on Transfer Funds page
Test Steps:
1. Select From Account and To Account
2. Enter negative amount (e.g., -100)
3. Click 'Transfer'
Expected Result: Error message: Amount must be greater than zero

Title: Transfer Fails if Source and Destination Accounts are Same
Preconditions: User is on Transfer Funds page
Test Steps:
1. Select same account for From Account and To Account
2. Enter valid amount
3. Click 'Transfer'
Expected Result: Error message: Source and destination accounts must be different

Title: Transfer Fails if Amount Exceeds Balance
Preconditions: User is on Transfer Funds page with insufficient balance
Test Steps:
1. Select From Account with insufficient balance
2. Select To Account
3. Enter amount greater than available balance
4. Click 'Transfer'

Title: Transfer Fails if Invalid Numeric Value Entered
Preconditions: User is on Transfer Funds page
Test Steps:
1. Select From Account and To Account
2. Enter invalid numeric value (e.g., letters, special characters) in amount field
3. Click 'Transfer'

Title: Boundary: Minimum Transfer Amount
Preconditions: User is on Transfer Funds page
Test Steps:
1. Enter minimum allowed transfer amount (e.g., $0.01)
2. Select valid accounts
3. Click 'Transfer'
Expected Result: Transfer succeeds if amount is valid

Title: Boundary: Maximum Transfer Amount
Preconditions: User is on Transfer Funds page with sufficient balance
Test Steps:
1. Enter maximum allowed transfer amount (equal to available balance)
2. Select valid accounts
3. Click 'Transfer'
Expected Result: Transfer succeeds if amount is valid

Title: Transfer with Decimal Amount
Preconditions: User is on Transfer Funds page
Test Steps:
1. Enter valid decimal amount (e.g., $100.50)
2. Select valid accounts
3. Click 'Transfer'
Expected Result: Transfer succeeds and amount is correctly debited/credited
